title: Jaysuk Zdpayo

Jaysukh comes to Ahmedabad city and got a job in a firm. He falls in love with Jigna, his co-worker, meanwhile his boss's sister (Kiran) comes back to India after completing her graduation from London and falls in love with Jaysukh.
